---
title: "Research Papers"
format: html
toc: false
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<!-- # CIOP - Cognitive Interaction Optimization Platform -->

<!-- CIOP consists of two sub projects -->

# \> **Autonomous Command Optimization Network (ACON)**

 [v1.0 via Multi-Arm Bandit](./acon.qmd) - <b>[**Completed**]{style="color:green;"}


<br>

# \> **Computational Optimization & Precision Engine (COPE)**

  <b>[*In Progress*]{style="color:Orange;"}



<br>


# \> **Cognitive Optimization Workflow Intelligence (CIOW)**

   <b>[*Coming Soon*]{style="color:gray;"}
